mapper.select: SELECT * FROM message_recipient WHERE message_id = #{messageId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO message_recipient (message_id, receiver_id, receiver_name, status, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES
(#{item.messageId}, #{item.receiverId}, #{item.receiverName}, #{item.status}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM message_recipient WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND status = 0 AND deleted = 0
